con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" xmlns:impl="http://impl.ws.doconline.coninf.com.ar" xmlns:xsd="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd"> <soap:Header/> <soap:Body> <impl:autorizarComprobante> <!--Optional:--> <impl:ctx> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:idSesion>?</xsd:idSesion> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:interfaz>?</xsd:interfaz> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:nroTransaccion>?</xsd:nroTransaccion> </impl:ctx> <!--Optional:--> <impl:concepto>?</impl:concepto> <!--Optional:--> <impl:tipoDoc>?</impl:tipoDoc> <!--Optional:--> <impl:nroDoc>?</impl:nroDoc> <!--Optional:--> <impl:tipoCbte>?</impl:tipoCbte> <!--Optional:--> <impl:ptoVta>?</impl:ptoVta> <!--Optional:--> <impl:nroCbte>?</impl:nroCbte> <!--Optional:--> <impl:impTotal>?</impl:impTotal> <!--Optional:--> <impl:impTotConcNoGrav>?</impl:impTotConcNoGrav> <!--Optional:--> <impl:impNeto>?</impl:impNeto> <!--Optional:--> <impl:impIva>?</impl:impIva> <!--Optional:--> <impl:impTrib>?</impl:impTrib> <!--Optional:--> <impl:impOpEx>?</impl:impOpEx> <!--Optional:--> <impl:fechaCbte>?</impl:fechaCbte> <!--Optional:--> <impl:fechaVencPago>?</impl:fechaVencPago> <!--Optional:--> <impl:fechaServDesde>?</impl:fechaServDesde> <!--Optional:--> <impl:fechaServHasta>?</impl:fechaServHasta> <!--Optional:--> <impl:monedaId>?</impl:monedaId> <!--Optional:--> <impl:monedaCtz>?</impl:monedaCtz> <!--Zero or more repetitions:--> <impl:tributos> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:tributoAlic>?</xsd:tributoAlic> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:tributoBaseImp>?</xsd:tributoBaseImp> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:tributoDesc>?</xsd:tributoDesc> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:tributoId>?</xsd:tributoId> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:tributoImporte>?</xsd:tributoImporte> </impl:tributos> <!--Zero or more repetitions:--> <impl:ivas> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:ivaBaseImp>?</xsd:ivaBaseImp> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:ivaId>?</xsd:ivaId> <!--Optional:--> <xsd:ivaImporte>?</xsd:ivaImporte> </impl:ivas> </impl:autorizarComprobante> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>

con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://impl.ws.doconline.coninf.com.ar" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:ns1="http://org.apache.axis2/xsd" xmlns:ns="http://impl.ws.doconline.coninf.com.ar" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:http="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/http/" xmlns:ax23="http://response.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd" xmlns:ax21="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:mime="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/mime/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/"> <wsdl:documentation>DocOnlineServicioWeb</wsdl:documentation> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://response.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd"> <xs:complexType name="Response"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigo" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descripcion" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="esReintento" nillable="true" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="observacion" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="ResponseAutorizarComprobante"> <xs:complexContent> <xs:extension base="ax23:Response"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cae" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="errMsg" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="excepcionWsaa" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="excepcionWsfev1" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fechaVencimiento" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="obs" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="resultado" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="xmlRequest" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="xmlResponse" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="ResponseAutenticacion"> <xs:complexContent> <xs:extension base="ax23:Response"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="idSesion" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema> <xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd"> <xs:complexType name="ControlTransaccion"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="idSesion" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="interfaz" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nroTransaccion" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="Tributo"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tributoAlic" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tributoBaseImp" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tributoDesc" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tributoId" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tributoImporte" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="TipoIva"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ivaBaseImp" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ivaId" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ivaImporte" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema> <xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://impl.ws.doconline.coninf.com.ar" xmlns:ax24="http://response.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd" xmlns:ax22="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd"> <xs:import namespace="http://tx.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd"/> <xs:import namespace="http://response.model.rest.doconline.coninf.com.ar/xsd"/> <xs:element name="autorizarComprobante"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ctx" nillable="true" type="ax21:ControlTransaccion"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="concepto" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoDoc" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nroDoc" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoCbte" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ptoVta" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nroCbte" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impTotal" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impTotConcNoGrav" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impNeto" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impIva" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impTrib" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="impOpEx" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fechaCbte" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fechaVencPago" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fechaServDesde" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fechaServHasta" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="monedaId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="monedaCtz" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="tributos" nillable="true" type="ax21:Tributo"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="ivas" nillable="true" type="ax21:TipoIva"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="autorizarComprobanteResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" nillable="true" type="ax23:ResponseAutorizarComprobante"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="cerrarSesion"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="interfaz" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="idSesion" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="cerrarSesionResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" nillable="true" type="ax23:Response"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="iniciarSesion"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="interfaz" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="clave" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="iniciarSesionResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" nillable="true" type="ax23:ResponseAutenticacion"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="iniciarSesionRequest"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="ns:iniciarSesion"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="iniciarSesionResponse"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="ns:iniciarSesionResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="autorizarComprobanteRequest"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="ns:autorizarComprobante"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="autorizarComprobanteResponse"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="ns:autorizarComprobanteResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="cerrarSesionRequest"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="ns:cerrarSesion"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="cerrarSesionResponse"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="ns:cerrarSesionResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="DocOnlineServicioWebPortType"> <wsdl:operation name="iniciarSesion"> <wsdl:input message="ns:iniciarSesionRequest" wsaw:Action="urn:iniciarSesion"/> <wsdl:output message="ns:iniciarSesionResponse" wsaw:Action="urn:iniciarSesionResponse"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="autorizarComprobante"> <wsdl:input message="ns:autorizarComprobanteRequest" wsaw:Action="urn:autorizarComprobante"/> <wsdl:output message="ns:autorizarComprobanteResponse" wsaw:Action="urn:autorizarComprobanteResponse"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="cerrarSesion"> <wsdl:input message="ns:cerrarSesionRequest" wsaw:Action="urn:cerrarSesion"/> <wsdl:output message="ns:cerrarSesionResponse" wsaw:Action="urn:cerrarSesionResponse"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="DocOnlineServicioWebSoap11Binding" type="ns:DocOnlineServicioWebPortType"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http" style="document"/> <wsdl:operation name="iniciarSesion"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:iniciarSesion" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="autorizarComprobante"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:autorizarComprobante" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="cerrarSesion"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:cerrarSesion" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:binding name="DocOnlineServicioWebSoap12Binding" type="ns:DocOnlineServicioWebPortType"> <soap12:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http" style="document"/> <wsdl:operation name="iniciarSesion"> <soap12:operation soapAction="urn:iniciarSesion" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="autorizarComprobante"> <soap12:operation soapAction="urn:autorizarComprobante" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="cerrarSesion"> <soap12:operation soapAction="urn:cerrarSesion" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:binding name="DocOnlineServicioWebHttpBinding" type="ns:DocOnlineServicioWebPortType"> <http:binding verb="POST"/> <wsdl:operation name="iniciarSesion"> <http:operation location="iniciarSesion"/> <wsdl:input> <mime:content type="application/xml" part="parameters"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <mime:content type="application/xml" part="parameters"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="autorizarComprobante"> <http:operation location="autorizarComprobante"/> <wsdl:input> <mime:content type="application/xml" part="parameters"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <mime:content type="application/xml" part="parameters"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="cerrarSesion"> <http:operation location="cerrarSesion"/> <wsdl:input> <mime:content type="application/xml" part="parameters"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <mime:content type="application/xml" part="parameters"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="DocOnlineServicioWeb"> <wsdl:port name="DocOnlineServicioWebHttpSoap11Endpoint" binding="ns:DocOnlineServicioWebSoap11Binding"> <soap:address location="http://192.168.0.105:8080/doconline-ws/services/DocOnlineServicioWeb.DocOnlineServicioWebHttpSoap11Endpoint/"/> </wsdl:port> <wsdl:port name="DocOnlineServicioWebHttpSoap12Endpoint" binding="ns:DocOnlineServicioWebSoap12Binding"> <soap12:address location="http://192.168.0.105:8080/doconline-ws/services/DocOnlineServicioWeb.DocOnlineServicioWebHttpSoap12Endpoint/"/> </wsdl:port> <wsdl:port name="DocOnlineServicioWebHttpEndpoint" binding="ns:DocOnlineServicioWebHttpBinding"> <http:address location="http://192.168.0.105:8080/doconline-ws/services/DocOnlineServicioWeb.DocOnlineServicioWebHttpEndpoint/"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
